communications.subject: DC Freedom of Information Act Request: TANF sanction statistics
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the DC Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Information related to the District of Columbia's Temporary Assistance for Needy Families (TANF) program sanctions from 2022 through 2025. Specifically, the following information, as it is available:

1) Number of TANF cases with adults in the unit that experienced any sort of sanction by year
2) Share of all TANF cases with adults in the unit that experienced any sort of sanction by year
3) Number of child-only TANF cases that experienced any sort of sanction by year
4) Share of child-only TANF cases that experienced any sort of sanction by year
5) Number of Separate State Program (SSP) cases that experienced any sort of sanction by year (separately by whether the case has adults in the unit or is a child-only case, if available)
6) Share of SSP cases that experienced any sort of sanction by year (separately by whether the case has adults in the unit or is a child-only case, if available)

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 15 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Gabrielle Pepin

title: FTC Complaints for Narconon (Scientology Drug Rehab)

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: FTC Complaints for Narconon (Scientology Drug Rehab)
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All complaints received since January 1, 2000 pertaining regarding the Narconon drug rehabilitation program. This request is a clone of another request filed and responded to in 2015. I would like any responsive documents generated since that request was filed. I’ve attached a link to that request to assist in your locating responsive documents. 

- Previous request I would like to update with more current information - https://www.muckrock.com/foi/united-states-of-america-10/ftc-complaints-for-narconon-rainbow-canyonscientology-drug-rehab-17647/

These organization also operate under the name 

Narconon New Life
Narconon Fresh Start
Narconon Fresh Start Drug Rehab
Narconon Rainbow Canyon Retreat
Rainbow Canyon Retreat
Rainbow Canyon Recovery Center
Fresh Start Recovery Center
Fresh Start Nevada

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Nate Zaffiro
